zotero.abstractNote: The BRAIN Initiative Cell Census Network (BICCN) has generated a comprehensive multimodal cell census and atlas of the mammalian primary motor cortex (MOp). By integrating single-cell transcriptomic, epigenomic, morphological and electrophysiological data, we have identified a hierarchical organization of cell types, including neuronal and non-neuronal cells, and mapped their spatial distribution and connectivity. This atlas provides a foundational resource for understanding the cellular architecture and functional organization of the mammalian brain.
